adapters.label: Hermes Agent
adapters.install_hint: Install Hermes Agent, add it to PATH, install the hermes-coven shim, and complete Hermes setup before using this adapter.
adapters.description: Hermes adapter with native model forwarding. Uses the hermes-coven shim so the harness trailing positional prompt is remapped to hermes chat -q/--query without changing model arguments.
